books.title: Daily Victory Confession 2026
books.subtitle: Six Months of Decrees, Prophecy, and A Word in Verse
books.description: One hundred and eighty four days of enriched devotion: KJV anchor verses, Greek and Hebrew word studies, five decrees a day, prophecy, prayer, and a closing quatrain. July through December 2026.

books.title: The Benefits of Salvation
books.subtitle: Two Volumes · 55 Chapters of Present and Eternal Riches
books.description: Twenty six present benefits and twenty nine eternal benefits of the salvation of God, traced verse by verse through the whole counsel of Scripture.

books.title: Anatomy of Love
books.subtitle: A 26 Module Exposition of 1 Corinthians 13
books.description: Love examined limb by limb: a devotional register for the heart and a scholarly register for the study, with Greek word studies throughout.

books.title: The Ten
books.subtitle: Three Volumes · Ten Life Skills Across Every Tier
books.description: Ten skills that build a life, taught across three ascending volumes with practical drills and scriptural anchors.

books.title: The Chronicles of Toba
books.subtitle: A Nigerian Christian Thriller
books.description: Faith under fire in a story that moves like a chase and lands like a sermon. A novel of courage, conviction, and the God who does not blink.

books.title: The Holy One
books.subtitle: A Study Across All 66 Books of Scripture
books.description: Qadosh. Chasid. Qaddish. Hagios. Hosios. Every appearance of the title traced with Strong's numbers from Genesis to Revelation.

books.title: Isaiah: The Gospel Prophet
books.subtitle: A Verse by Verse Journey with Hebrew Word Studies
books.description: The evangelist of the Old Testament opened chapter by chapter, with the Hebrew beneath every promise and the Messiah shining through every page.

books.title: Jeremiah: The Weeping Prophet
books.subtitle: Tears, Fire, and the Faithfulness of God
books.description: The prophet who could not hold his peace, studied with Hebrew word by word care: the call, the cost, and the covenant that outlasted the ruins.

books.title: Ezekiel: Visions of Glory
books.subtitle: Wheels, Watchmen, and the River from the Throne
books.description: From the valley of dry bones to the temple of glory, Ezekiel expounded with Hebrew studies and the shepherd heart of a watchman.

books.title: The Priesthood of Christ
books.subtitle: Special Edition with Illustrated Diagrams
books.description: After the order of Melchizedek: the offices, the offering, and the intercession of our Great High Priest, illustrated throughout.

books.title: Theology of the Tabernacle
books.subtitle: Every Board, Every Veil, Every Shadow of Christ
books.description: The tent in the wilderness drawn out in full color diagrams and doctrine, from the brazen altar to the mercy seat.

books.title: The Mentored Life, Volume I
books.subtitle: The Protégé: Learning to Be Led
books.description: How to find, follow, and honor the voice God has set over your life. The first half of the mentorship covenant.

books.title: The Mentored Life, Volume II
books.subtitle: The Mentor: Learning to Lead
books.description: How to pour without emptying, correct without crushing, and release without losing. The second half of the covenant.

books.title: The House in Order, Volume I
books.subtitle: Church Structure, Governance, and Culture
books.description: The architecture of a healthy church: offices, departments, accountability, and the culture that holds them together.

books.title: The House in Order, Volume II
books.subtitle: Assessment, Adaptation, and Growth
books.description: The working companion: self assessment modules, cultural adaptation, and the road from structure to strength.

books.title: Mastering Church Branding
books.subtitle: The Complete Fifteen Book Library
books.description: Fifteen volumes on carrying the message with excellence: identity, voice, design, platforms, and the stewardship of a name.

books.title: Scriptural Intelligence
books.subtitle: The Twelve Book Study Library
books.description: Twelve volumes that train the believer to rightly divide the Word: languages, context, structure, and sound interpretation.

books.title: The Wealth Code
books.subtitle: Nine Volumes of Kingdom Financial Education
books.description: Stewardship, multiplication, enterprise, and generational wealth, taught from Scripture across nine progressive volumes.

books.title: The Parables of the King
books.subtitle: Every Parable Expounded, Opening with the Ten Virgins
books.description: Every parable of the Lord Jesus opened for doctrine and for the heart, beginning where the lamps burn low. The first volume of the Christ Shelf.

books.title: I AM
books.subtitle: The Seven Declarations in John
books.description: Bread, Light, Door, Shepherd, Resurrection, Way, and Vine. Seven doors into the identity of Christ, one volume.

courses.title: Mastering Church Branding
courses.description: The complete fifteen part curriculum on building a church identity that carries the message with excellence, from name to logo to voice to platform.

courses.title: Personal Branding Mastery
courses.description: Fourteen modules on becoming known for what God has placed in you: positioning, presence, platforms, and the discipline of a consistent voice.

courses.title: The Wealth Code
courses.description: Nine volumes of kingdom financial education taught as a structured course: stewardship, multiplication, enterprise, and generational wealth.

courses.title: Scriptural Intelligence
courses.description: Twelve modules that train you to study the Word for yourself: languages, context, structure, and the tools of sound interpretation.

courses.title: The Fashion Business Curriculum
courses.description: Twenty seven courses and over seven hundred pages of instruction on building a fashion enterprise from gift to garment to global brand.

courses.title: The Tabernacle Masterclass
courses.description: Walk through the wilderness tent chamber by chamber with full color diagrams, Hebrew word studies, and Christ revealed in every article.

courses.title: Wordsmith: Writing for Ministry
courses.description: Sermons, devotionals, poetry, and books: the craft of putting eternal truth into words that live. Taught with exercises and live edits.

courses.title: Digital Ministry Production
courses.description: From sermon to screen: content systems, publishing rhythm, and the tools that carry one message across every platform with excellence.

courses.title: The Mentorship Track
courses.description: Both sides of the covenant in one course: how to be led as a protégé and how to lead as a mentor, with covenant templates included.
